title: api: fix the CPU stats reported

comments.body:
It seems not to report `percpu_usage` anymore (which is probably correct as I am on CGroupsV2).
But it still does not show `system_cpu_usage` without which it is not possible to get any useful data from this.
LGTM but it looks like our CI is still fighting.

is `rdoproject.org/github-check` blocking?

Given how often it fails, should we make it optional?
It is not blocking. Although I wish someone from RDO would look into what is failing?
You can safely ignore the RHEL8-packaging issue, is unrelated and we already made it non-voting, until someone is fixing it.
